name: Kaelio
long_description:
Kaelio is the intelligence layer for Customer Success.

We connect your CRM, support, product analytics, and billing tools, then surface the signals no single tool can show you. Your team gets churn risk, expansion opportunities, and recommended actions delivered before their morning coffee.

CS teams today switch between five tools to understand one account. They catch churn too late, spend hours prepping QBRs, and piece together signals manually across disconnected tools.

Kaelio fixes that. It correlates signals across your entire stack and delivers proactive intelligence where your team already works. No migration, no new dashboards, no added work for data or engineering teams.
one_liner: The intelligence layer for Customer Success
